title: AFK Camera Forge
description: Unofficial Forge port of AFK Camera by Playsi.
body:
# AFK Camera (Unofficial Forge Port)

An unofficial Forge port of AFK Camera originally created by Playsi.

This port was made to bring the mod to Minecraft Forge users.

## Original Mod

Original Fabric version by Playsi:

- Modrinth: https://modrinth.com/mod/afk-camera
- GitHub: https://github.com/playsi/AFK-camera

Published with permission from the original author.

## Features

AFK Camera allows the camera to smoothly rotate around the player while AFK, creating a cinematic idle view.

## Dependencies

### Required
- YACL (Yet Another Config Library)
## Compatibility

- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Forge

## Credits

Original mod by Playsi.

This project is an unofficial Forge port and is not affiliated with or endorsed as an official release by the original author.

This port will be archived once an official Forge or NeoForge version is released by the original author.
